title: cremanthodium wardii
intro: Cremanthodium wardii, also known as Ward's cremanthodium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. Cremanthodium wardii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine practices.
